room.caption: [NightmareB3] It's a long way down, but I'm sure you'll make it. Just... take your time and observe carefully.

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="This corner serves no purpose other than making you scratch your head in confusion and wondering 'why'." signSize=2
stringToShow="If you didn't scratch your head in regards to the previous sign, then it failed. RobinLSL says it is so." signSize=2
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=4 yDir=0 shiftChange=24 spriteChange=10
